name: The Fox in the Forest
description: The Fox in the Forest is a two-player trick-taking duel set in a fairy-tale wood — three suits (bell, key, moon), trump-rank odd-cards with special powers (the Fox steals the trump suit; the Witch swaps the trump card; the Woodcutter peeks at the deck), and a clever scoring twist that punishes both winning too few and winning too many tricks. Storybook art, ten-minute games, surprisingly deep.
